tagline: A visual, no-code experience for data transformation.
what_it_does: Lakeflow Designer is a visual, no-code, AI-native tool for data preparation and analytics, allowing users to create workflows through a drag-and-drop interface and natural language. These workflows, known as visual data preps, are supported by production-ready code and governed by Unity Catalog, ensuring a seamless transition from prototype to production. Users can utilize built-in operators or define their own custom operators to enhance functionality.
why_it_matters: This release empowers data analysts to efficiently prepare and transform data without needing extensive coding skills, thereby increasing productivity and reducing time to insights. By leveraging a governed environment, organizations can ensure compliance and data integrity, which is critical for decision-making and operational efficiency.

capabilities.title: Visual Data Preps
capabilities.desc: Create and manage data transformation workflows using a drag-and-drop interface.

capabilities.title: Built-in Operators
capabilities.desc: Utilize a variety of pre-defined operators to streamline data preparation tasks.

capabilities.title: User-defined Operators
capabilities.desc: Develop custom operators tailored to specific business needs and workflows.

capabilities.title: Natural Language Processing
capabilities.desc: Leverage natural language to simplify the creation of data transformation tasks.

prerequisites: Databricks workspace with Unity Catalog enabled.
Compliance security profile may be required for some features.
use_cases: Data analysts preparing datasets for reporting.
Business users transforming data without coding.
Creating custom data transformation workflows for specific analytics needs.

steps.title: Access Lakeflow Designer
steps.desc: Navigate to Lakeflow Designer within your Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Create a Visual Data Prep
steps.desc: Use the drag-and-drop interface to build your data transformation workflow.

steps.title: Ingest Data
steps.desc: Import data into your visual data prep using the provided ingestion tools.

steps.title: Utilize Built-in Operators
steps.desc: Incorporate built-in operators to enhance your data transformation process.

steps.title: Define Custom Operators
steps.desc: Create user-defined operators to meet specific transformation requirements.

key_takeaway: Lakeflow Designer's GA release enhances data transformation capabilities for analysts, promoting efficiency and compliance.
